statement: Use subagent delegation for independent, well-scoped tasks that do not require sharing state with the parent. Good targets: research, file exploration, test execution, documentation. Poor targets: tasks requiring iterative user feedback or complex parent context dependency.
publicSummary: Delegate independent, well-scoped tasks to subagents. Keep interactive and context-heavy tasks in the parent.
cautionNotes: VS Code disables runSubagent for subagents (hardcoded in Copilot extension core). Only top-level agents can delegate. Design agents to detect the absence of runSubagent and fall back to skill-driven execution.
